title: taeniatherum caput-medusae subsp. asperum
intro: Taeniatherum caput-medusae subsp. asperum, also known as Blue Melilot or Woolly Melilot, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high levels of isoflavones and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Taeniatherum caput-medusae subsp. asperum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal medicine, this plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
